checks.reason: The corrected node is scoped to the Spanish treasure-fleet convoy system, which NPS dates to the 1530s.
The Spanish system grouped merchant ships into protected convoys while adding state armed escort.
Cannon-armed merchant ships and warship escorts supplied convoy protection.
Galleons were the armed oceangoing cargo-and-warship platform for Spanish treasure fleets.
Voyage recordkeeping is outside the corrected Spanish treasure-fleet convoy scope.
Maritime insurance prices commercial risk but is not source-backed as a direct prerequisite for Spain's armed convoy requirement.
Venetian arsenal standardized parts should not depend directly on the Spanish treasure-fleet convoy node.
